specific_question: Is Elexion Automotive current CRM system capable of supporting a full direct-to-customer sales model as of July 2025?
answer: No, as of July 2025, Elexion Automotive current CRM system is not capable of supporting a full direct-to-customer sales model. It is designed specifically for dealership management and lacks the customer-direct functionality.
dr_question: How will Elexion Automotive's adoption of a complete direct-to-customer sales model by 2026 affect sales cycle duration, conversion rates, and average revenue per customer across the United States with franchise laws?
